prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.7L twin-turbocharged V6 (engine code: **AAN**) with forged internals: Mahle forged pistons (83.5mm, 8.5:1 CR), Carillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from **JE Pistons**. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860-5** turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) per bank, custom **Tial MV-R 44mm** wastegates, and **Precision Turbo 46mm** external wastegate dump tubes. Upgrade fueling with **Bosch 044** high-flow fuel pumps, **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr** injectors, and a **Walbro 450 LPH** in-tank pump. Manage boost with a **Hydra Nemesis 2.7** standalone ECU and a **TurboSmart e-Boost2** controller for 1.2 bar (17.5 psi) peak pressure.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **Quaife ATB differential** (80% lock) in the front and rear, **034 Motorsport** lightweight aluminum driveshaft, and **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** twin-disc clutch with a **Sachs Performance** dual-mass flywheel. Strengthen the transmission with a **01E 6-speed manual swap** (from the S4) using a **Peloquin** limited-slip differential and **Red Line MT-90** transmission fluid for durability under 500+ lb-ft torque.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Variant 3 coilovers** (8-way adjustable damping, 40mm front/30mm rear drop) paired with **H&R** 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars. Polyurethane bushings from **034 Motorsport** (full subframe, control arms, and trailing arms) and **Powerflex** black series engine mounts. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 355mm 4-piston front calipers** (from Audi RS4 B5) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads, **Brembo 330mm 2-piston rear calipers**, and **Goodridge G-Stop** braided stainless steel brake lines. Wheels: **BBS RS-GT II 9x17 ET35** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 245/40/17 tires.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (C4-specific, bolt-on fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom carbon fiber** overfenders (hand-laid by **Seibon**) and **VIS Racing** side skirts. Rear wing: **APR Performance GT-250** (3D carbon fiber, adjustable angle) mounted on **custom aluminum pedestals** for a 150mm height. Front splitter: **9 Lives Racing** 3-piece carbon fiber with **aluminum support rods** for downforce at speed.

Custom **Rotiform LAS-R** 10x18 ET25 wheels (gold finish) with **Nankang AR-1** 265/35/18 semi-slick tires. Wheel spacers: **H&R Trak+** 25mm front/20mm rear for aggressive flush fitment. Exterior accents: **3M Matte Brushed Aluminum** vinyl wrap on the roof, mirrors, and lower body panels, with **Oracle Lighting** RGB LED halo headlights (C4-specific housings) and **Lux H8 V4** high-output LED fog lights.

Interior: **Recaro SRD** (C4-compatible) front seats with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Mod.70** steering wheel (350mm, suede), and **NRG Innovations** quick-release hub. Roll cage: **Custom 8-point chromoly** cage by **Autopower** (bolt-in, no welding) with **Sparco** fireproof padding. Gauges: **Defi Advance BF** 60mm oil pressure, boost, and wideband (AEM X-Series) mounted in a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**. Shift knob: **TWM** short-throw (for 01E swap) with **custom engraved aluminum shift pattern plate**.
